requirements.title: common-pipeline-conventions documents the live-data wiring discipline
interaction-reviewer agent body documents the live-data wiring audit
Structural tests assert the v2.6.0 framework is wired

reuse_decisions.anchor: hooks/vao_tools.py — 8 existing tools live here; 9th is the same module-not-hook pattern
Existing Phase 5 interaction-completeness 3-reviewer swarm — extend mandate not add a 4th-team role; the swarm IS the 3 parallel reviewers
NO new agent role — the existing interaction-reviewer agent body extends to include the live-data-wiring audit
NO schema change — v2.2.0 live_verification_review optional field already covers the gating; the tool's verdict cites via existing verdict_path
tests/fixtures/vao/live-data-mock-residue.json — verbatim heirship-app-v3 case; canonical positive case the framework MUST catch
tests/test_vao_live_data_wiring.py + tests/test_live_data_wiring_discipline.py — dedicated files per the v2.1/v2.2 pattern
Live tamper-test execution — v2.6.x; v2.6.0 reads agent's tamper-test results
AST-based mock-residue detection — v2.6.x; v2.6.0 uses substring + regex

front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — documentation + structural-test + tool extension. The plugin's PRODUCT gains stronger live-data-wiring discipline; the plugin's OWN test surface is pytest stdlib-only.
